landing.hero_subtitle: Trusted care for every garment — we pickup, clean and deliver to your doorstep with meticulous attention to detail.
landing.about_p1: WashLab started with a simple mission: to provide the highest quality laundry and dry cleaning services with unmatched convenience. Today, we are proud to be the trusted partner for thousands of households and businesses.
landing.about_p2: Our state-of-the-art facility combines modern technology with traditional care techniques to ensure every garment is returned in its best possible condition.

wash_fold.title: Wash & Fold
wash_fold.desc: Everyday laundry handled with care. We wash, dry, and neatly fold your clothes.

stain_removal.title: Stain Removal

blanket_cleaning.title: Blanket Cleaning
blanket_cleaning.desc: Deep cleaning for heavy blankets, duvets, and comforters.

landing.pricing_subtitle: No hidden fees, just professional care for your clothes. Choose the service that fits your needs.
landing.price_variation_note: * Prices may vary based on fabric type and special requirements.
landing.contact_subtitle: Have a question or need a special service? Our team is here to help you.
landing.footer_desc: Standardizing the laundry industry with technology and professional care. Premium services delivered right to your doorstep.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.q1: How do I schedule a laundry pickup?
faqs.a1: Simply click on "Schedule Pickup" button, select your preferred date and time, and our team will arrive at your doorstep to collect your laundry. You can also track your order in real-time.
faqs.a2: We operate 7 days a week from 8 AM to 8 PM. You can schedule pickups and deliveries within this time frame. Express services are available for urgent requirements.
faqs.a3: Yes! Our express service offers same-day delivery for orders placed before 10 AM. Additional charges may apply for express service.
faqs.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a4: We accept all major payment methods including credit/debit cards, UPI, net banking, and cash on delivery. You can also maintain a wallet for faster checkout.

hero.tired_desc: It must take a lot of time to prepare before you go to town. After grocery shopping your hands are full, so you can't carry your laundry. Then you'll end up taking two trips to get your laundry done. We've got a hack! We'll pick-up & drop-off. We're here for you.
hero.solutions_title: Laundry Solutions For A Busy Life
hero.solutions_desc: When you need a laundry service that fits in with your busy life, you need Fabrico. We collect dirty laundry, clean it and deliver it back to you – all from your mobile or laptop.

sidebar.premium_perfume_desc: Leave all the worry of your clothes smelling weird to us. With Fabrico, fresh is the only way your clothes get back to you.
sidebar.trusted_detergent_desc: Choose the right detergent that gives your clothes the perfect amount of care. Quality washing chemicals that don't harm your fabric.
